overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative adventure game showing three characters walking along a scenic Mediterranean coastal cliff. The group transitions from an ocean overlook through dense colorful flower fields toward historic stone windmills and a mountain fortress.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking the sea

events.description: third character enters from right side of frame to join the group

agents.ego_description: Amicia walking along the narrow cliff path holding Hugo's hand, with the sea to the left and rocky cliffs to the right

notable_agents.action: Sophia entering the frame from the right to join Amicia and Hugo

entered.detail: calm blue sea stretching to the horizon along the left side of the path
tan and brown rocky cliff face rising steeply on the right side
tall stone tower perched on the distant cliff edge
dry grass and low shrubs lining the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit coastal cliff path with the Mediterranean Sea visible to the left and rocky terrain to the right. Amicia and Hugo walk forward along the trail as Sophia enters from the right to join them, with a distant stone fortress tower visible on the cliff ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with view of town below

events.description: group slows and stops briefly at the cliff edge to look out at the view

agents.ego_description: Amicia standing at the cliff edge with Hugo and Sophia, looking down at the coastal settlement below

notable_agents.action: Hugo standing between the two women looking down at the coastal town

entered.detail: cluster of buildings with terracotta roofs visible on the hillside descending to the sea

segments.scene_description: The three characters walk together along the cliff edge, with the stone fortress now closer on the right. They pause to overlook a coastal town nestled on the hillside below, with the expansive sea stretching behind it.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain slope with towering rock formation

events.description: group turns inland away from the coast toward the mountain fortress

agents.ego_description: the group turns left away from the coastal view and walks toward the imposing mountain fortress

entered.detail: tall rocky mountain spire with the fortress structure at its base
green grass covering the hillside to the right of the path

segments.scene_description: The group pivots away from the sea and begins ascending toward the mountain. The coastal view falls away behind them as they face a massive rocky peak with the stone fortress now visible on the left, surrounded by grassy slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: flower-lined mountain trail with stone windmills

events.description: stone windmills come into view at the end of the flower-lined path

agents.ego_description: Amicia and Hugo walking hand-in-hand through the dense colorful flowers toward the windmills

entered.detail: dense bushes of red, pink, orange and white bougainvillea lining the left side of the path
dense bushes of red, pink, orange and white bougainvillea lining the right side of the path
low stone wall running alongside the flower path
three traditional stone windmills with conical roofs and wooden blades atop the hill

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow trail densely packed with vibrant flowering bushes in shades of red, pink, and white. The group walks through this floral corridor toward three historic stone windmills that appear on the hilltop ahead, while the mountain fortress remains visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a Mediterranean cliffside that transitions from an expansive ocean overlook into a vibrant floral corridor leading toward historic landmarks. It begins on a sunlit coastal path where Amicia and Hugo are joined by Sophia, moving forward with a distant stone fortress tower marking the horizon. As the group walks along the cliff edge, the camera pauses to capture a coastal town nestled on the hillside below before pivoting away from the sea to ascend toward a massive rocky peak. The scene then shifts as the coastal vista falls away, replaced by a narrow trail densely packed with red, pink, and white flowering bushes. Finally, the camera follows the group through this floral corridor toward three historic stone windmills on the hilltop, with the mountain fortress remaining visible in the far distance.
